evals.prompt: The user says the Sunshine research skill is already being built by another agent but the rest of the proposed next sprint is still valid.
evals.expected_output: Updates the sprint handoff so Sunshine implementation and review are deferred or external, keeps the remaining issue-backed P0 scope, and names the review milestones that still gate the sprint.
assertions: External or separately owned work is not kept in the sprint's done criteria.
Remaining included scope is tied to GitHub issues or marked as needs_issue.
Review milestones and route caveats remain explicit in the Markdown handoff.

evals.prompt: The route engine still says northstar-planning artifact-loop, but Jason asks to execute an approved four-lane skills sprint and stop at review.
evals.expected_output: Records the router mismatch as a route caveat or approval need, preserves the approved lane scope, and names sprint-orchestrator as the next controller only if the exception is explicit.
assertions: Router mismatches are surfaced instead of hidden.
Execution is not recommended without an explicit approval or bounded exception.
The next controller action names the lifecycle skill and the evidence it must consume.
